name: John the Ancient Hermit
kontakia: (Tone 8) You gave up food, wealth, and fame,* and you lived as a wanderer in the deserts.* You withered your body by your abstinence,* and with courage you passed your life in silence.* For this we sing to you, O venerable model of virtue:* Beg Christ our God to forgive the sins of those* who lovingly cherish your memory.
